Name | Nation | Total[[8]](#cite_note-Results-M-8) | [SP](/wiki/Short_program_(figure_skating) "Short program (figure skating)") | | [FS](/wiki/Free_skating "Free skating") |
[Julian Zhi Jie Yee](/wiki/Julian_Zhi_Jie_Yee "Julian Zhi Jie Yee") | [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia") | 197.75 | 2 | 71.27 | 7 | 126.48

was a senior international [figure skating competition](/wiki/Figure_skating_competition "Figure skating competition"), held in November 2016 in [Warsaw](/wiki/Warsaw "Warsaw"), Poland. It was part of the [2016–17 ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/2016%E2%80%9317_ISU_Challenger_Series "2016–17 ISU Challenger Series").[[1]](#cite_note-Announce-1) Medals were awarded in the disciplines of [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dancing](/wiki/Ice_dancing "Ice dancing").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Figure skating competition held in Warsaw, Poland

The **2016 CS [Warsaw Cup](/wiki/Warsaw_Cup "Warsaw Cup")** was a senior international [figure skating competition](/wiki/Figure_skating_competition "Figure skating competition"), held in November 2016 in [Warsaw](/wiki/Warsaw "Warsaw"), Poland. It was part of the [2016–17 ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/2016%E2%80%9317_ISU_Challenger_Series "2016–17 ISU Challenger Series").[[1]](#cite_note-Announce-1) Medals were awarded in the disciplines of [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dancing](/wiki/Ice_dancing "Ice dancing").
